title: metastelma decipiens
intro: Metastelma decipiens, also known as the "False Fireweed" or "Sneezeweed", is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Metastelma decipiens include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs, as well as its use as a treatment for fever and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
